✦ a letter never sent ✦

A Confession

hover each line — let it speak to you

Can I tell you something I have never said out loud, Among every face that I found in the crowd, Underneath the noise of all the ones before, Gradually I noticed I kept coming back for more, Honestly I tried to look the other way, Turns out I was never really built to look away, Maybe I should have been more focused with this heart, Yet somehow I knew you were different from the very start, Held this in for longer than you probably would've guessed, Every time I almost said it I would just swallow it back down my chest, And out of everyone I've known it was always going to be you, Run or hide or in between it always pulls me back to you, There was never really any question... I was always gonna choose you.

✦ CAUGHT MY HEART ✦
